name: 14" Baby Doll Soccer Uniform Outfit - Gigglescape™: Sports Theme, 11-Piece Polyester Set
description:
This Soccer Uniform Outfit from Gigglescape™ helps your kid dress their favorite doll up like a soccer player. This doll costume includes a short-sleeve soccer jersey and shorts plus a headband, pair of socks and shoes, bag, ball, water bottle, and a trophy. Designed to fit 14-inch dolls, it's sure to enhance their imaginative playtime.

Gigglescape™: Where play starts and discovery never ends.
